topic: hardware angle sensor config and pin definition
summary: Hardware must support the angle sensor/rotary angle meter. Required configuration options must be provided, GPIO/pin assignments must be defined, and HiFiBerry/Pi pin dependencies must be respected. Pin allocation must be documented in the PR comment and treated as mandatory shared knowledge.

requests.summary: Extend the hardware component so it is designed for the angle sensor/rotary angle meter, with required configuration support and defined GPIO/pin assignments.
constraints: provide the necessary configuration for the angle sensor/rotary angle meter
respect dependencies and conflicts with HiFiBerry and other Raspberry Pi pins
do not create a pin assignment that collides with required existing hardware usage
pin assignment must be documented in the PR comment
pin assignment knowledge must be treated as mandatory for all involved contributors
acceptance: hardware component includes the required angle-sensor configuration capability
HiFiBerry and Raspberry Pi pin conflicts are checked and respected
the resulting PR includes a clear pin-allocation comment
the implementation leaves no ambiguity about which pins are reserved and why
